text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm out shopping...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I notice Eishin Flash standing in front<n>of a store
wearing a troubled<n>expression.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I came here to buy stollen, but it<n>seems the store
is closed because the<n>owner had to step out on
emergency<n>business.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This will cause major delays in my<n>plans. I had
not accounted for this.<n>What ever should I do?
choice_data_list: I'm sure there's another store that sells it.
I'm sure there's another store that sells it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This will cause major delays in my<n>plans. I had
not accounted for this.<n>What ever should I do?
choice_data_list: I'm sure there's another store that sells it.
I'm sure there's another store that sells it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have never thought to do that, but<n>you are quite
right.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If I cannot buy any, then I can simply<n>make
some. Thankfully, I am able to<n>recall its flavor
vividly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If I use my parents' recipe as a base,<n>it should
be possible to reproduce the<n>taste.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your words of advice. I<n>shall return
to my dorm to make it at<n>once.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You are quite correct. Considering the<n>current
situation, I should have<n>prepared alternate
choices.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thankfully, my current plans consist<n>of taking a
stroll and buying stollen<n>along the way.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
As the task of finding another store<n>falls within
the category of taking a<n>stroll, my plans remain
intact.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I must make every effort to find<n>another store
before the time frame<n>for these tasks passes!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your words of advice. I<n>shall look
for another store at once.
